creator: sunpoet@sunpoet.net
text:
I forgot to attach the patch for shlib bump (multimedia/abby and
multimedia/cclive).
Here it is.

- Sunpoet

--- bump-portrevision.patch begins here ---
diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/multimedia/abby/Makefile
/usr/ports/sunpoet/abby/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/multimedia/abby/Makefile	2010-07-29 01:12:25.000000000 +0800
+++ /usr/ports/sunpoet/abby/Makefile	2010-07-29 22:07:49.000000000 +0800
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@

 PORTNAME=	abby
 PORTVERSION=	0.4.8
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTREVISION=	2
 CATEGORIES=	multimedia net
 MASTER_SITES=	GOOGLE_CODE

===> Done
===> Generating patch
===> Viewing diff with less
diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/multimedia/cclive/Makefile
/usr/ports/sunpoet/cclive/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/multimedia/cclive/Makefile	2010-07-29 01:12:25.000000000 +0800
+++ /usr/ports/sunpoet/cclive/Makefile	2010-07-29 22:08:30.000000000 +0800
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@

 PORTNAME=	cclive
 PORTVERSION=	0.6.2
-PORTREVISION=	2
+PORTREVISION=	3
 CATEGORIES=	multimedia net
 MASTER_SITES=	GOOGLE_CODE

--- bump-portrevision.patch ends here ---
